title: Choclatey Re-Melted
body:
# What is Choclatey

Choclatey is a modpack originally created with the help of moderators on hypixel, Mineplex, and The hive. Since then it has been edited and transformed into a modpack for accessibility and quality of life, Alot of these features now go against These servers TOS and as such should be used at USER discretion

This is a modpack to add accesibility Quality Of Life, and more features to the game. 

Compliant with *most*  Major server rules.

## Features
*oh god there is alot so ill go over the main features currently in 3.0*

### Accesibility 
- Better f3
- Controlify 
     This allows users to play the game with a controller....or steamdeck.
- Jade 
     when looking at a block it will show you what that block is, Usefull for people using new resourcepacks, Colourblindness and more.

### Quality Of Life.
- Xaeros Mini and World map
- Phantom shapes
        Builders rejoice! this mod allows you to place fake shapes in the world to use as building guides!
- zume
       Its a zoom mod. Every modpack should have one.
- Appleskin
        Will show you the saturation and hunger increase of an item before eating it.
- Client sort
       You can now sort inventories at the click of a button!
- Rei
     Everyone knows what rei is, Its the funny thing to view recipes!
- Hardcover, 
       A *bunch* of improvements to the vanilla recipe book for those who dont like Rei
- Lambdynamic Lights
        Dynamic lights! hold a torcxh have it light up the area
